title.rendered: [On Demand] Our 2026 Certificate in AI for Marketing & Fundraising Program 👩🏽‍💻

content.rendered:
Our 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program is now available on demand! Without a doubt, AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward.

Customized for nonprofit professionals, the webinar series provides a timely, honest approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why human creativity is more valuable than ever.
